metadata.heist_focus: crawl-space scouting, valve timing, wet-noise masking, and split-lane extraction
metadata.coordination_problem: two-front infiltration with a timed valve route and a noisy fallback route
metadata.goblin_aesthetic: glowing mushrooms, waxed grates, wet rope, stolen crumbs, and ankle-deep dwarven runoff

entry_warren.name: Goblin Entry Warren
entry_warren.description: A cramped goblin approach lined with glowing mushrooms, waxed grates, wet rope, stolen crumbs, and ankle-deep dwarven runoff.

mischief_lane.name: Mischief Lane
mischief_lane.description: The main coordination lane for crawl-space scouting, valve timing, wet-noise masking, and split-lane extraction.

objective_hold.name: Sluice Clapper Key Post
objective_hold.description: Pinch the sluice clapper key before the dwarves can ring the tunnel alarm.

furniture.name: Mushroom Shadow Shelf
furniture.description: Mushroom Shadow Shelf supports crawl-space scouting, valve timing, wet-noise masking, and split-lane extraction.

furniture.message: The scout melts into a bruise-colored mushroom shadow.

break_effect.message: Mushroom Shadow Shelf breaks loudly enough to make several beards twitch.

furniture.name: Sluice Valve Wheel
furniture.description: Sluice Valve Wheel supports crawl-space scouting, valve timing, wet-noise masking, and split-lane extraction.

furniture.message: The kobold packs the valve teeth with wax and pebble grit.

break_effect.message: Sluice Valve Wheel breaks loudly enough to make several beards twitch.

furniture.name: Drip Chain
furniture.description: Drip Chain supports crawl-space scouting, valve timing, wet-noise masking, and split-lane extraction.

furniture.message: The dripping chain is tied into a silent goblin knot.

break_effect.message: Drip Chain breaks loudly enough to make several beards twitch.

scripts.coordination_contract: two-front infiltration with a timed valve route and a noisy fallback route

achievements.title: Quiet Toolwork
achievements.description: Resolve a mechanism or alarm feature in Mushroom Sluice pico without turning the run into a brawl.

achievements.title: Mischief Coordination
achievements.description: Create a distraction or trap setup that opens the Mushroom Sluice route.

achievements.title: Snack Tax With Interest
achievements.description: Take optional loot while still completing the pico heist.
